situation: audit-047 SZ-BG-L-003 (low): chrome.sidePanel.setPanelBehavior called twice — once inside onInstalled listener (line 297) and again at top-level (line 300). setPanelBehavior persists across browser sessions; the top-level call fires on every service worker wake with no additional effect, wasting IPC.
action: Removed redundant top-level setPanelBehavior call. Kept only the onInstalled path. Added comment explaining persistence semantics to prevent future re-addition.
